biological_replicate: UBAC2 restrains inflammatory responses and acute ulcerative colitis (UC) in mice.
technical_replicate: We performed triplicate injections for the analysis.
experimental_design: UBAC2 role in ER-phagy and inflammatory responses
UBAC2 serves as an ER-phagy receptor to suppress UPR and ER stress-associated inflammatory responses.
factor_value: UBAC2 serves as an ER-phagy receptor.
number_of_fractions: If no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described anywhere in the text.
number_of_samples: Since there is 1 biological replicate and no fractions are mentioned.
